notes: "installs" directX, then launches. Briefly shows Game Cursor, then gets stuck on black screen. Alt-Tabbing revealed an error window: "prMovie: Open - Unable to connect pins". Clicking ok on this error closes the game.
title: Agarest: Generations of War 2

notes: It starts up to a blank screen. I waited around for a while and tried hitting a bunch of buttons to make sure it wasn't just a video not playing, before eventually killing the process.
title: Agarest: Generations of War 2

notes: After running install quartz with protontricks and manually installing the LAVFilters codec pack game runs just fine. Original issue related to codecs in Ubuntu, wine, or both.
title: Agarest: Generations of War 2
